title: trifolium macraei var. dichotomum
intro: Trifolium macraei var. dichotomum, also known as dichotomous pea or dichotomous clover, is a variety of the Trifolium macraei plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Trifolium macraei var. dichotomum has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders, and it has been used to treat conditions like bloating and gas. In herbal medicine, Trifolium macraei var. dichotomum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
